milestoneTitle: Phase M9.5a — Projects: killed the Saved | + New project sub-pills and moved Projects to hash-based sub-routes. #projects shows the saved list (home state); #projects/new shows the Finder. Added parseRoute / navigateTo / applyRoute + popstate/hashchange listeners so the nav chips, the new Start-a-new-project CTA, the Dashboard Projects panel CTA, the Finder Save handler, and the Dashboard continue-rows all drive the same route pipeline. Deep links (/#projects/new) work; browser back button is honored. Two stale .subpill[data-projects-view="saved"].click() callsites replaced with navigateTo("projects", ""). Dashboard Learn CTA lost its now-defunct data-subpill="courses" (M9.4a retired those pills). Full-page Finder chrome (Back link, step indicator, draft-resume banner) lands in M9.5b; this commit only moves the routing.
